name: startup-team
description: 16-role product/engineering team for Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI, with role routing, localized aliases, and curated role skills.

interface.shortDescription: 16 product and engineering roles for Codex workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Startup Team to route work to product, analysis, architecture, engineering, design, delivery, and QA role playbooks with localized role aliases and curated role skills.
defaultPrompt: Use /team to route this task to the right startup-team role.
Use /role backend-go-developer to handle a Go backend task.
